name: 5q35_3_subtelomeric_SD
description: 5q35.3 subtelomeric SD region distal to the Sotos critical interval. Contains FLT4 (VEGFR3), GNB2L1, and a ~60 kb subtelomeric duplicon shared with other chromosome ends at ~95% identity. Terminal 5q deletions (rare) and subtelomeric translocations involving 5qter are mediated by this block.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD block of ~60 kb shared with multiple chromosome ends at ~95% identity; FLT4 receptor tyrosine kinase intragenic SDs; degenerate (TTAGGG)n telomere boundary.
